human_leverage.summary: The loopback console makes the synthetic housefile, truthful current public grant lifecycle, bounded ledger, and simulated interlock state reviewable through one owner-authenticated UI. Owner status/snapshot now persist due expiry before projection, removing the need for a robot request or manual reconciliation to refresh the active-grant view. The owner accepted the corrected loading duration, semantic color separation, and blueprint label containment on 2026-07-14.

blocked_claims: browser storage, URL, cookie, screenshot, log, or build-artifact persistence of owner or grant credentials
wildcard CORS or authorization of a foreign browser origin
public, LAN, hosted, or production deployment
live GPT-5.6 response quality, cost, latency, or token use
running API use of a materialized housefile
robot command relay, device motion, physical hardware stop, or certified safety
